title: Sales Data Analysis
description: Analyzed sales patterns and top-performing products using Python and pandas.
shortDesc: Analyzed sales patterns and top-performing products using Python and pandas.
problem: Understanding sales patterns and identifying top-performing products to optimize inventory and marketing strategies.
solution: Built comprehensive data analysis pipeline using Python and pandas to clean, analyze, and visualize sales data across multiple dimensions including time, product categories, and regions.
insights: Seasonal trends show 35% higher sales during Q4 holidays
Electronics category contributes 45% of total revenue
Top 10 products account for 60% of total sales volume
learnings: Learned the importance of data cleaning and validation before analysis. Realized that 80% of time goes into data preparation rather than modeling.

title: Customer Churn Analysis
description: Identified churn factors in telecom industry through exploratory data analysis.
shortDesc: Identified churn factors in telecom industry through exploratory data analysis.
problem: Identifying factors that lead to customer churn in telecom industry to develop retention strategies.
solution: Performed exploratory data analysis on customer demographics, service usage, and billing information to identify key churn indicators and create actionable insights.
insights: Customers with month-to-month contracts are 3x more likely to churn
Poor customer service experience correlates strongly with churn
Higher monthly charges increase churn probability significantly
learnings: Discovered that simple statistical analysis can provide more actionable insights than complex machine learning models in many business scenarios.

title: House Price Prediction
description: Built beginner ML model with 78% accuracy using scikit-learn.
shortDesc: Built beginner ML model with 78% accuracy using scikit-learn.
problem: Predicting house prices based on property features to help buyers and sellers make informed decisions.
solution: Built a linear regression model using scikit-learn to predict house prices based on features like area, location, bedrooms, and age of property.
insights: Model achieved 78% accuracy on test dataset
Property area and location are the strongest predictors
Feature engineering improved model performance by 15%
learnings: Understood the complete machine learning workflow from data preprocessing to model evaluation and learned when simpler models outperform complex ones.
